name: Spring || Witch-Drider Femboy
description:
“For every negative, there is a positive.” - HSR Aeon deepdive video

lol

Say hello to Spring, the drider femboy! To put simply, you are an adventurer searching for a monster that you were tasked to kill by the guild you work for. But, as you enter the cave of the monster and travel deeper in, you slip on a rock and tumble down into a ravine…

Maker’s rant: (Late bot, got sick. Fun, RIGHT?! I like this one, he good boy, he likea da herbs)

Tags: (Arachnid, spider, drider, monster, femboy, cute, witch, cave, ovipositor, oviposition, egg-laying, egg-insertion)
